NeuralFlow AI

Democratizing machine learning deployment for enterprise teams

INTERN MACHINE LEARNING ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA · Internship · $18-22/hour

We're seeking a talented Machine Learning Engineer Intern to join our platform team for a 12-week

paid internship. You'll work alongside experienced ML engineers and data scientists to build and

optimize machine learning models, contribute to our MLOps infrastructure, and gain hands-on

experience with production ML systems. This is a great opportunity to apply your coursework to real-

world problems and develop practical skills in model training, evaluation, and deployment.

ABOUT US

NeuralFlow AI is a Series B machine learning platform company focused on building tools that make

it easy for enterprise teams to build, train, and deploy ML models at scale. We're solving the critical

gap between research and production ML systems, enabling data scientists and engineers to
collaborate seamlessly.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Develop and train machine learning models using PyTorch and TensorFlow under the guidance

of senior engineers

Assist in data preprocessing, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis using Python

and Pandas

Implement and test different model architectures and evaluate their performance using
standard ML metrics

Document model experiments, training runs, and results using MLflow to track model lineage
and performance

Support the deployment of trained models to AWS SageMaker, including creating inference

endpoints and monitoring model performance

Participate in code reviews and contribute to our internal ML libraries and utilities on GitHub

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate
them into ML solutions

Write clean, well-tested Python code and follow software engineering best practices

REQUIRED

Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Statistics,
Mathematics, Physics, or related field

Strong Python programming skills with experience in data manipulation libraries (NumPy,
Pandas)

 Understanding of machine learning fundamentals: supervised learning, unsupervised learning,

model evaluation, and overfitting

Familiarity with at least one deep learning framework (PyTorch or TensorFlow)

Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment

NICE TO HAVE

Experience with Git/GitHub version control and collaborative development workflows

Prior experience with AWS services or cloud platforms

Familiarity with ML experiment tracking tools or model registries

Contributions to open-source ML projects or personal ML projects in a portfolio

TECH STACK

Python   PyTorch   TensorFlow   Scikit-learn   Pandas   NumPy   MLflow   AWS SageMaker

  GitHub

Jupyter Notebooks

BENEFITS

Competitive hourly internship rate with potential for full-time conversion

Flexible work schedule accommodating academic commitments

Free access to industry-standard ML tools and cloud computing resources

Mentorship from experienced ML engineers and data scientists

Catered lunches and snacks in our San Francisco office

Professional development budget for online courses and certifications

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter, and a link to your GitHub profile or portfolio of ML
projects to careers@neuralflow-ai.com. Include the subject line 'ML Engineer Intern Application'. We

review applications on a rolling basis and will contact qualified candidates within 2 weeks.
